bupt.ta.util

类 InterviewScheduleSupport

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.util.InterviewScheduleSupport

  • public final class InterviewScheduleSupport
extends java.lang.Object
    Normalizes the MO posting form's estimated interview time.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static java.lang.String dateInputValue(java.lang.String raw) 
      static java.lang.String endTimeInputValue(java.lang.String raw) 
      static java.lang.String normalizeFromForm(java.lang.String dateRaw, java.lang.String startRaw, java.lang.String endRaw) 
      static java.lang.String startTimeInputValue(java.lang.String raw) 

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 方法详细资料

      • normalizeFromForm

        public static java.lang.String normalizeFromForm(java.lang.String dateRaw,
                                                 java.lang.String startRaw,
                                                 java.lang.String endRaw)
        参数:
        dateRaw - ISO date from the form
        startRaw - start time (HH:mm)
        endRaw - end time (HH:mm)
        返回:
        canonical schedule text stored on Job
        抛出:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - when fields are missing or invalid

      • dateInputValue

        public static java.lang.String dateInputValue(java.lang.String raw)
        参数:
        raw - stored interview schedule text
        返回:
        date portion for form repopulation, or empty

      • startTimeInputValue

        public static java.lang.String startTimeInputValue(java.lang.String raw)
        参数:
        raw - stored interview schedule text
        返回:
        start time for form repopulation, or empty

      • endTimeInputValue

        public static java.lang.String endTimeInputValue(java.lang.String raw)
        参数:
        raw - stored interview schedule text
        返回:
        end time for form repopulation, or empty
